steps.title: Identify what almost all mosques include
steps.content: The key signal is in the phrase which almost all mosques include. This tells us exactly what the blank must describe: a feature present in nearly every mosque. We need a word meaning widespread or common to almost all cases.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
Universal means found in nearly all instances—exactly what a structural feature present in almost all mosques is. Elaborate, illusory, and idealized each describe different properties (complexity, deception, or perfection) unrelated to prevalence.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
